prerequisites: An active Ruddr workspace with access to Settings.
A Ruddr API key generated from the workspace Settings area (used as the api_token).

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Ruddr authenticates with a workspace API key sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer <token>). Provide this key as the connector's api_token field. Keys grant read/write access to workspace data and remain valid until revoked.

setupSteps.title: Create a Ruddr API key
setupSteps.body: In Ruddr, open the Settings area and select the API Keys option. Click 'Create an API Key', enter a name for the key, and click Submit. Copy the generated key and store it securely, since it is shown only once.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated Ruddr API key as the required api_token field. The connector sends it as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' on each request to the Ruddr API.
